title: lwc-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the lwc-builder agent. Missing-required or under-constrained inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

component_name.description: camelCase bundle name, e.g. 'opportunityClosePlan'. No hyphens, no leading uppercase.

feature_summary.description: One-line feature prose. At least 10 words — enforced by Gate A word-count rule.

data_shape.description: What kind of data the component needs. Drives wire vs imperative choice.

target_objects.description: SObject API names the component reads/writes. Required when data_shape ∈ {record-form, list-view, search}. Accepts list or comma-separated string.

referenced_fields.description: Fully-qualified Object.Field names the component binds to. Gate B validates each against the org stub.

public_api.description: camelCase @api property names to expose. recordId is required for record-page binding.

emit_controller.description: True when the component needs a custom @AuraEnabled Apex controller (UI API isn't sufficient). Gate B then requires controller_class_name.

controller_class_name.description: PascalCase Apex class name when emit_controller=true.

controller_methods.description: @AuraEnabled method names the controller must expose. Each appears as an imperative or @wire import from the LWC.

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of a real org Gate C can deploy-validate against. When absent, Gate C runs static-only.
